zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Peacock於1656年10月24日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本時，她的父親John B Peacock41歲，母親Joyce Susan Webber36歲。她於大約1672年與Nathaniel Richardson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1719年12月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Peacock于1656年10月24日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本时，她的父亲John B Peacock41岁，母亲Joyce Susan Webber36岁。她于大约1672年与Nathaniel Richardson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1719年12月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Peacock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English pecock, pacok, pocok, Old English pēacocc ‘peacock’. It could be used as a personal name or as a nickname for one ‘as proud as a peacock’. Compare Paw , Pay . This surname is widespread in England and southern Scotland, and is also established in Ireland. Compare Pea .

variants.name: Pavone
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Gaetano, Luca, Luigi, Nicola, Antonio, Biagio, Carmelo, Concetta, Cono, Cosmo, Gino.
Italian:
from pavone ‘peacock’, used as a nickname for a proud or vain man, and also as a personal name. Compare Peacock .

variants.name: Paw
meanings: Polish: nickname from paw ‘peacock’.
English (London): variant of   Poe  .

Burmese (Karen): from a personal name usually forming part of a compound name, from hpaw ‘flower’. — Note: Since Karens do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

variants.name: Peak
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in different parts of England named in Old English with pēac ‘hill, knoll, peak’, includingPeak (Hill) in Sidmouth (Devon), East and West Peek in Luffincot (Devon), a minor locality in Chiddingly (Sussex) once called Peke (now Peke's House), and the Peak District, an area of rugged hills in northwest Derbyshire and adjacent counties.
English: possibly a nickname from the Middle English word in 1 above, denoting a stout, thick-set man.
English: shortened form of   Peacock  .

variants.name: Pea
meanings: English:

nickname from Middle English pa(we), po(we) ‘peacock’ (Old English pāwa and Old Norse pá). See Peacock . Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Pawe (Old English Pāwa), Latinized as Pavo, and derived from the nickname.
from the Middle English personal name Paw(e), a pet form of Paulin or occasionally Paul. See Pawson , Paulin .

variants.name: Peyman
meanings: English (southern):

from Middle English pe, pey, pay ‘peacock’ + man, perhaps a nickname denoting a dandy or an occupational name for someone who bred peacocks for a rich man's garden or dinner table. Compare Peacock , Peabody .
alternatively, the surname could mean ‘Pey's servant’, from the Middle English personal name Pey + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Pocock
meanings: English: variant of   Peacock  .

variants.name: Peaco
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Peacock  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Màiri .

variants.name: Màiri
meanings: Gaelic equivalent of Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Peacock was born on 24 October 1656, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John B Peacock, was 41 and her mother, Joyce Susan Webber, was 36. She married Nathaniel Richardson about 1672, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 22 December 1719, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Peacock est née le 24 octobre 1656, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John B Peacock, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joyce Susan Webber, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Nathaniel Richardson environ 1672, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 décembre 1719, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Peacock am 24. Oktober 1656 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John B Peacock 41 und ihre Mutter Joyce Susan Webber 36. Sie hat um 1672 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Nathaniel Richardson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Dezember 1719 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Peacockが1656年10月24日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで生まれた時，父John B Peacockは41歳，母Joyce Susan Webberは36歳であった。約1672年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンでNathaniel Richardsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1719年12月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで63歳で死去した。

ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스트라트퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Peacock(이)가 1656년 10월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John B Peacock(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joyce Susan Webber(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1672년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 Nathaniel Richardson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1719년 12월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Peacock nasceu em 24 de outubro de 1656, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John B Peacock, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Joyce Susan Webber, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Nathaniel Richardson aproximadamente 1672, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de dezembro de 1719, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 63 anos.

ru.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Stratford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony: стратфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Peacock родилась 24 октября 1656 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John B Peacock было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joyce Susan Webber, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nathaniel Richardson около 1672 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 22 декабря 1719 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет.

es.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Peacock nació el 24 de octubre de 1656, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John B Peacock, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Joyce Susan Webber, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Nathaniel Richardson aproximadamente 1672, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 22 de diciembre de 1719, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años.
